remarks: Rare one bedroom apartment with off-street parking on Lafayette St. Freshly painted, and professionally cleaned. New light fixtures, door mechanics, and conveniently located to all Stamford has to offer. Plenty of unique storage space. Tenant responsible for gas (heat, hot water, cooking).
